## Analytics truth checks

- [ ] Official race results remain separate from inferred analytics.
- [ ] Grid-to-Finish movement is not confused with First Observed movement.
- [ ] First Observed position is not presented as true grid/start position.
- [ ] RaceIQ scores and grades remain explanatory aids, not official rankings.
- [ ] Known incidents, timing issues, anomalies and confidence caveats remain visible.

## Risks and caveats

- 

## Merge / deployment checks

- [ ] Target branch is `main`.
- [ ] Required checks pass or skipped checks are explicitly justified.
- [ ] Browser/local validation is complete, or browser-pending merge authority is recorded.
- [ ] Post-merge deployment or validation follow-up is clear.

## Pre-approval groundedness review

Before approval, add a top-level PR comment answering:

1. Did we do what was needed?
2. Did we only do what was asked?

Final recommendation must be one of:

- `Approve`
- `Approve after minor fixes`
- `Do not approve yet`
